{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320163655825F04D379CE0D03846B"}"},"total":2887},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6980659424348734240","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看的，很喜欢。这是主角开挂的时候，特别牛逼。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1625311431,"group_id":"6954300985514658830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人间哪有真情在，只要是仔我都爱","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1UNW13swZpsqfmsFs2lVURqDAewwSFp19zCnVA+5XbS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c2c90bb40e1c4135aacea782d66dcd93~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534206&x-signature=A6q66upfzKYUftd11Kn3qOxDDeA%3D","user_id":"1538914750576733","user_name":"提瓦特材料大盗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1538914750576733","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6954300985514658830","book_info":{"abstract":"【全站唯一！】
苏泽穿越到一个打游戏就能成为人上人的世界，只要赢了别人，就能够获得想要的一切！
而自带游戏修改器的他，还没开始，就已经赢在了起跑线上！
我的世界：当别人还在挖木头时，苏泽已经用钻石块搭起了城堡！
绝地求生：当别人拿着98K当老阴逼时，苏泽开着他的人形自走高达到处屠杀！
英雄联盟：当别的玩家出门只有500块时，苏泽的英雄已经六神装开砍了！
全球大佬震惊，这人玩的游戏和我们不太一样！
路人A：卧槽，苏泽的声望值居然有999999点！
路人B：听说某某市已经被苏泽一人给承包了！
路人C：苏泽我会暖床，你能教我怎么打游戏吗？
